python_pptx_test_template.pptx is copied from the python-pptx project test fixtures:
  https://github.com/scanny/python-pptx/blob/v0.6.23/tests/test_files/test.pptx
License (MIT): https://github.com/scanny/python-pptx/blob/v0.6.23/LICENSE

It is used only as an OOXML shell so we can assemble slides without installing python-pptx/lxml in restricted networks.
